sentence: The system must provide 100% uptime at all times.

violations.suggestion: 100% uptime is unachievable; use 99.9% (three nines, ~8.7h/yr downtime) to 99.999% (five nines, ~5min/yr)
violations.highlighted: The system must provide >>100%<< uptime at all times.

violations.suggestion: 100% uptime is physically unachievable; use 99.9% (three nines) to 99.999% (five nines)
violations.highlighted: The system must provide >>100% uptime<< at all times.
The system must provide 100% uptime at all times.

sentence: The API must respond with zero latency.

violations.suggestion: Zero latency is physically impossible; the speed of light alone imposes a minimum floor
violations.highlighted: The API must respond with >>zero latency<<.

sentence: The service must never fail under any circumstances.

violations.suggestion: 'never fail' is an absolute; replace with a maximum failure rate (e.g. MTBF >= N hours)
violations.highlighted: The service must >>never fail<< under any circumstances.
The service must never fail >>under any circumstances<<.

sentence: The platform must always be available without exception.

violations.suggestion: 'always be available' implies 100% availability; replace with an explicit SLA percentage
violations.highlighted: The platform must >>always be available<< without exception.

sentence: The pipeline must process data with zero downtime.

violations.suggestion: Zero downtime is an absolute no real system can guarantee; specify a maximum rate or MTBF
violations.highlighted: The pipeline must process data with >>zero downtime<<.

sentence: The system must offer unlimited throughput.

violations.suggestion: 'unlimited throughput' is unbounded; all real systems have resource limits — specify a maximum supported value
violations.highlighted: The system must offer >>unlimited throughput<<.

sentence: The cache must provide instantaneous retrieval.

violations.suggestion: Instantaneous retrieval ignores physical transmission time, OS scheduling, and processing overhead
violations.highlighted: The cache must provide >>instantaneous retrieval<<.

sentence: The service must be synchronous and non-blocking.

violations.suggestion: A call cannot be both synchronous (caller blocks) and non-blocking (caller continues); choose one model
violations.highlighted: The service must be >>synchronous<< and >>non-blocking<<.

sentence: The component must be stateless and maintain session state.

violations.suggestion: Stateless and stateful are mutually exclusive; a stateless service cannot maintain session state
violations.highlighted: The component must be >>stateless<< and >>maintain session<< state.
The component must be stateless and maintain >>session state<<.

sentence: The system must process requests in real-time and via batch processing.

violations.suggestion: Real-time and batch processing are conflicting execution models; split into two separate requirements
violations.highlighted: The system must process requests in >>real-time<< and via >>batch processing<<.

sentence: All data must be encrypted and stored in plaintext for auditing.

violations.suggestion: Data cannot be simultaneously encrypted and stored as plaintext
violations.highlighted: All data must be >>encrypted<< and stored in >>plaintext<< for auditing.

sentence: The module must be immutable and allow updates from admin users.

violations.highlighted: The module must be immutable and allow updates from admin users.

sentence: The API must respond within 0.1ms for all requests.

violations.suggestion: Sub-millisecond network latency is only achievable for local in-process calls; LAN round-trips are typically 1–5ms, WAN 10–300ms
violations.highlighted: The API must respond within >>0.1ms<< for all requests.

sentence: The system must maintain 99.9999% availability.

violations.suggestion: Six nines (99.9999%) implies < 32 seconds downtime/year — verify your infrastructure can sustain this before committing
violations.highlighted: The system must maintain >>99.9999%<< availability.

sentence: The service must process 1,000,000 requests per second with 1ms latency.

violations.suggestion: Achieving 1.0ms latency at 1,000,000 RPS requires specialised infrastructure; verify with load testing and clarify whether this applies to p50 or p99 latency
violations.highlighted: The service must process >>1,000,000 requests per second<< with >>1ms<< latency.

sentence: The API must respond within 200ms for 95% of requests under 1000 RPS.
The service must maintain 99.9% uptime with planned maintenance windows.
The system must support downloading PDF files to disk.

violations.highlighted: The system must support downloading >>PDF files<< to disk.

sentence: The system must encrypt all data before writing to disk.
User enters their username and password on the login page
